---
title: 'Research Publications'
listing:
  id: pub-listing
  contents:
    - '**/index.qmd'
  type: custom
  template: _pub-item.ejs.md
  fields:
    - title
    - date
    - path
    - subtitle
    - author
    - doc-id
    - doi
    - draft
    - license
  sort: "path asc"
---

::: {#pub-listing}
:::
